name: New Easy 7 Grain Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Arrowhead Mills Seven Grain Cereal
5-1/2 cups Arrowhead Mills Whole Wheat Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over Seven Grain Cereal in a large mixing bowl.
2. Dissolve yeast in warm water. When the cereal is lukewarm, add yeast and all remaining ingredients except 3 cups flour.
3. Beat vigorously for 2 minutes. Work in remaining flour.
4. Divide dough into half and spread into bottom of two oiled loaf pans. Let rise until double.
5. Bake at 375°F for 35-45 minutes.
